# BGContinuedProcessingTaskRequest.Resources

**Structure**

Options that specify additional system resources a background task needs.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Resources
```

## Overview

The following properties are of this type:

- Continuous Background Task request ([doc://com.apple.backgroundtasks/documentation/BackgroundTasks/BGContinuedProcessingTaskRequest]) property [doc://com.apple.backgroundtasks/documentation/BackgroundTasks/BGContinuedProcessingTaskRequest/requiredResources].
- [doc://com.apple.backgroundtasks/documentation/BackgroundTasks/BGTaskScheduler] property [doc://com.apple.backgroundtasks/documentation/BackgroundTasks/BGTaskScheduler/supportedResources].

## Identiying a resource

- **gpu**: An option that indicates a long-running task requires the GPU.

## Creating a resource

- **init(rawValue:)**: Initializes a required resource for a Continuous Background Task by raw value.

## Identifying resource dependencies

- **requiredResources**: An option that indicates any special system resources that the task requires.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- ExpressibleByArrayLiteral
- OptionSet
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
- SetAlgebra
